skill.name: ponyflash
skill.description: Generate images, videos, speech audio, and music using the PonyFlash Python SDK. Also handle local media editing with FFmpeg, including clip, concat, transcode, extract audio, frame capture, subtitle capability checks, and ASS subtitle prep. Use when the user asks to create, generate, produce, edit, trim, merge, concatenate, transcode, subtitle, or render AI-generated media content.
skill.summary: Generate images, videos, speech audio, and music using the PonyFlash Python SDK. Also handle local m...
skill.author: ponyflash

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate AI media generation and editing skill. Static findings show external commands (FFmpeg), network access (PonyFlash API), filesystem operations (media files), and environment variable access (API keys). These are all expected behaviors for a media processing skill. The 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' findings are false positives from scanner confusion. No malicious intent or security vulnerabilities confirmed.

content.user_title: Generate AI Images, Videos, Speech and Music
content.value_statement: Create professional AI-generated media content including images, videos, speech audio, and music using PonyFlash cloud services. Also edit local media with FFmpeg for trimming, merging, subtitles, and format conversion.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using PonyFlash AI models
Create videos from text descriptions or first-frame references
Synthesize speech audio with voice cloning and emotion control
Generate background music from text descriptions
Edit local media files: clip, concat, transcode, extract audio
Burn subtitles into video and create ASS subtitle files
limitations: Requires PonyFlash API key for cloud generation (paid service)
Requires local FFmpeg installation for media editing tasks
Credit balance needed for cloud generation beyond free tier
Some features require specific FFmpeg filters (subtitle filters)

use_cases.title: Content Creator
use_cases.description: Generate AI videos and images for social media, YouTube, or marketing campaigns with speech narration and background music
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, social media managers, digital marketers

use_cases.title: Video Editor
use_cases.description: Process and edit local video files: trim clips, merge segments, extract audio, add subtitles, and convert formats

use_cases.title: Developer
use_cases.description: Integrate AI media generation into applications or automation workflows for generating assets on-demand

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ponyflash skill to generate an image of a sunset over mountains with vibrant orange and purple colors
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to create a single AI image

prompt_templates.title: Video with Speech
prompt_templates.prompt: Use ponyflash to create a 5-second video of ocean waves, then add speech narration saying 'Welcome to our new product launch'
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants video with voiceover

prompt_templates.title: Media Editing Task
prompt_templates.prompt: Use ponyflash to clip the input video from 5 seconds to 15 seconds and extract the audio to MP3
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to edit local media files

prompt_templates.title: Full Production Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Use ponyflash with the crepal-director playbook to create a short promotional video about a new coffee brand
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants multi-step production with playbook

output_examples.input: Generate an image of a futuristic city with flying cars
output_examples.output: Image URL from PonyFlash CDN showing the generated futuristic cityscape

output_examples.input: Trim video from 00:00:10 to 00:00:30 and add subtitles
output_examples.output: A trimmed video file with hardcoded subtitles burned in

best_practices: Always check API key and credit balance before starting generation tasks
Verify FFmpeg capabilities (especially subtitle filters) before subtitle operations
Use playbooks for complex multi-step production workflows to ensure proper asset sequencing
anti_patterns: Starting generation without verifying API key validity and credit balance
Attempting subtitle operations without checking FFmpeg subtitle filter availability
Using the skill for local editing without having FFmpeg installed

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: For cloud generation (images, videos, speech, music) you need a PonyFlash API key. For local FFmpeg editing, no API key is required.

faq.question: How do I get a PonyFlash API key?
faq.answer: Register at ponyflash.com, go to the API key page, and copy your key. It starts with 'rk_'.

faq.question: Do I need to install FFmpeg?
faq.answer: Only for local media editing tasks. Run scripts/check_ffmpeg.sh to verify FFmpeg is installed and has required capabilities.

faq.question: Can I edit local videos without cloud generation?
faq.answer: Yes, the FFmpeg scripts work independently for clip, concat, transcode, extract-audio, and frame capture operations.

faq.question: What are Creative Playbooks?
faq.answer: Playbooks are step-by-step production workflows in the playbooks/ directory. They guide you through multi-step content creation.

faq.question: How do I check my credit balance?
faq.answer: Use the PonyFlash account.credits() method or visit ponyflash.com/usage to view your balance.
